sizing_rule.note: Scale equal-sized units proportionally with account equity. Unit count increases at $1,200 (2 units), $4,000 (3 units), $8,000 (4 units). Each unit = Account equity / number_of_units, with $1,000 minimum per unit. Risk per unit implicit in R-multiple framework.

source_rule_text: Scale the number of equal-sized position units proportionally with account size, increasing unit count at defined capital thresholds to manage risk and optimize capital deployment.
